Highlights: Surfing, swimming, sunset watching. Beginner-friendly waves. Main beach area.
Transportation Notes: Walk from accommodations in Urbiztondo area

Highlights: Three-layer waterfall with swimming pools. 40ft high first layer. Crystal-clear water. Cliff jumping spots.
Transportation Notes: Hire guide at entrance. Wear proper shoes. Bring waterproof bag.

Highlights: Chinese Taoist temple dedicated to Matzu. Sea-facing. Buddha statues, mango trees. Photo-friendly.
Transportation Notes: Along the highway. Easy access by car.

Highlights: Intermediate surfer spot. Right point waves. Less crowded than Urbiztondo.
Transportation Notes: Short drive from Urbiztondo. For more advanced surfers.

Best Time: Early morning or late afternoon for clearer views
Highlights: Panoramic view of Cordillera Mountains and mining sites. Souvenir shops, Ifugao costume photo (extra fee).
Transportation Notes: Jeepney 'Mines View' from Session Road ₱13.75. Taxi ₱100-150.

Highlights: Famous ube jam (₱450-599), strawberry jam, peanut brittle (₱220). Fresh baked goods.
Address: Gibraltar Road, near Mines View Park
Transportation Notes: Walk from Mines View Park (5 min). Products have 1-month shelf life.

Highlights: 32.84 hectares urban park. Artificial lake with boat rentals. Walking trails, picnic areas, flower gardens.
Address: Jose Abad Santos Dr, Downtown Baguio
Transportation Notes: Central location. Walk from Session Road. Open 24/7.

Highlights: Main commercial street. 1.7km. Shops, restaurants, street food. Cool evening atmosphere.
Transportation Notes: Heart of Baguio. Most jeepneys pass here.

Entrance Fee (₱): Free entry. Historical Core ₱85 standard, ₱55 locals, ₱36 senior/student
Best Time: Morning for hiking, afternoon for leisure
Highlights: Former US military base. Pine forest trails (Eco Trail FREE), Historical Core, Butterfly Sanctuary (₱70). Tree Top Adventure activities (₱150-900).
Transportation Notes: Jeepney 'Scout Barrio' ₱10 from Session Road. Taxi ₱100-200.

Highlights: Wooded park with Pool of Pines. Horseback riding services by Ibaloi pony boys. Across from The Mansion.
Transportation Notes: Jeepney 'Mines View' route. Near The Mansion.

Highlights: Official summer residence of Philippine President. Built 1908. American colonial architecture. Photo ops at gates.
Address: CP Romulo Drive, across Wright Park
Transportation Notes: Across from Wright Park. Photos from outside only.

Highlights: Pick fresh strawberries. Strawberry products sold. Muddy paths - boots provided. Strawberry taho ₱50.
Address: La Trinidad, Benguet (30 min from Baguio)
Transportation Notes: Jeepney 'La Trinidad' from Session Road ₱20. Taxi ₱200. Open 7AM-5PM (arrive before 4PM).

Highlights: Chinese Taoist temple. Pagodas, dragons, koi pond, wishing well. NO photos inside temple. Panoramic mountain views.
Transportation Notes: Jeepney to La Trinidad. Ask driver. Opens 6AM-5PM.

Highlights: Art museum by National Artist BenCab. Philippine contemporary art, Cordillera artifacts. Eco-trail available.
Transportation Notes: 15-30 min from Baguio. Taxi ₱80-100. Last entry 5:30PM.

Highlights: Ukay-ukay thrift shopping. Jackets, vintage clothes, streetwear. Very cheap prices. Street food vendors.
Transportation Notes: Near Burnham Park. Walk from Session Road 10 min.

Highlights: Daytime ukay-ukay alternative to night market. Former hotel building. Commonwealth-era structure.
Transportation Notes: Near Session Road area. Multiple ukay stalls.
